accounts.name: tokenAAccount
docs: Token account of base tokens recipient

accounts.name: tokenBAccount
docs: Token account of quote tokens recipient

fields.name: amm
docs: Embedded FutarchyAmm - 1:1 relationship

fields.name: nonce
docs: `nonce` + `dao_creator` are PDA seeds

fields.name: twapInitialObservation
docs: For manipulation-resistance the TWAP is a time-weighted average observation,
where observation tries to approximate price but can only move by
`twap_max_observation_change_per_update` per update. Because it can only move
a little bit per update, you need to check that it has a good initial observation.
Otherwise, an attacker could create a very high initial observation in the pass
market and a very low one in the fail market to force the proposal to pass.
We recommend setting an initial observation around the spot price of the token,
and max observation change per update around 2% the spot price of the token.
For example, if the spot price of META is $400, we'd recommend setting an initial
observation of 400 (converted into the AMM prices) and a max observation change per
update of 8 (also converted into the AMM prices). Observations can be updated once
a minute, so 2% allows the proposal market to reach double the spot price or 0
in 50 minutes.

fields.name: twapStartDelaySeconds
docs: Forces TWAP calculation to start after `twap_start_delay_seconds` seconds

fields.name: minQuoteFutarchicLiquidity
docs: As an anti-spam measure and to help liquidity, you need to lock up some liquidity
in both futarchic markets in order to create a proposal.
For example, for META, we can use a `min_quote_futarchic_liquidity` of
5000 * 1_000_000 (5000 USDC) and a `min_base_futarchic_liquidity` of

fields.name: baseToStake
docs: Minimum amount of base tokens that must be staked to launch a proposal

fields.name: teamSponsoredPassThresholdBps
docs: The percentage, in basis points, the pass price needs to be above the
fail price in order for the proposal to pass for team-sponsored proposals.
Can be negative to allow for team-sponsored proposals to pass by default.

fields.name: quoteAmount
docs: How much quote token you will deposit to the pool

fields.name: maxBaseAmount
docs: The maximum base token you will deposit to the pool

fields.name: minLiquidity
docs: The minimum liquidity you will be assigned

fields.name: positionAuthority
docs: The account that will own the LP position, usually the same as the
liquidity provider

fields.name: liquidityToWithdraw
docs: How much liquidity to withdraw

fields.name: minBaseAmount
docs: Minimum base tokens to receive

fields.name: minQuoteAmount
docs: Minimum quote tokens to receive

fields.name: aggregator
docs: Running sum of seconds_since_last_update * last_observation.
Assuming latest observations are as big as possible (u64::MAX * 1e12),
we can store 18 million seconds worth of observations, which turns out to
be ~213 days.
Assuming that latest observations are 100x smaller than they could theoretically
be, we can store ~57 years worth of them. Even this is a very
very conservative assumption - META/USDC prices should be between 1e9 and
1e15, which would overflow after 1e15 years.
So in the case of an overflow, the aggregator rolls back to 0. It's the
client's responsibility to sanity check the assets or to handle an
aggregator at T2 being smaller than an aggregator at T1.

fields.name: lastPrice
docs: A price is the number of quote units per base unit multiplied by 1e12.
You cannot simply divide by 1e12 to get a price you can display in the UI
because the base and quote decimals may be different. Instead, do:
ui_price = (price * (10**(base_decimals - quote_decimals))) / 1e12

fields.name: lastObservation
docs: If we did a raw TWAP over prices, someone could push the TWAP heavily with
a few extremely large outliers. So we use observations, which can only move
by `max_observation_change_per_update` per update.

fields.name: maxObservationChangePerUpdate
docs: The most that an observation can change per update.

fields.name: initialObservation
docs: What the initial `latest_observation` is set to.

fields.name: startDelaySeconds
docs: Number of seconds after amm.created_at_slot to start recording TWAP

errors.name: AmmTooOld
errors.msg: Amms must have been created within 5 minutes (counted in slots) of proposal initialization

errors.name: InvalidInitialObservation
errors.msg: An amm has an `initial_observation` that doesn't match the `dao`'s config

errors.name: InvalidMaxObservationChange
errors.msg: An amm has a `max_observation_change_per_update` that doesn't match the `dao`'s config

errors.name: InvalidStartDelaySlots
errors.msg: An amm has a `start_delay_slots` that doesn't match the `dao`'s config

errors.name: InvalidSettlementAuthority
errors.msg: One of the vaults has an invalid `settlement_authority`

errors.name: ProposalTooYoung
errors.msg: Proposal is too young to be executed or rejected

errors.name: MarketsTooYoung
errors.msg: Markets too young for proposal to be finalized. TWAP might need to be cranked

errors.name: ProposalAlreadyFinalized
errors.msg: This proposal has already been finalized

errors.name: InvalidVaultNonce
errors.msg: A conditional vault has an invalid nonce. A nonce should encode the proposal number

errors.name: ProposalNotPassed
errors.msg: This proposal can't be executed because it isn't in the passed state

errors.name: InsufficientLiquidity
errors.msg: More liquidity needs to be in the AMM to launch this proposal

errors.name: ProposalDurationTooShort
errors.msg: Proposal duration must be longer 1 day and longer than 2 times the TWAP start delay

errors.name: PassThresholdTooHigh
errors.msg: Pass threshold must be less than 10%

errors.name: QuestionMustBeBinary
errors.msg: Question must have exactly 2 outcomes for binary futarchy

errors.name: InvalidSquadsProposalStatus
errors.msg: Squads proposal must be in Active status

errors.name: CastingOverflow
errors.msg: Casting overflow. If you're seeing this, please report this

errors.name: InsufficientBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient balance

errors.name: ZeroLiquidityRemove
errors.msg: Cannot remove zero liquidity

errors.name: SwapSlippageExceeded
errors.msg: Swap slippage exceeded

errors.name: AssertFailed
errors.msg: Assert failed

errors.name: InvalidAdmin
errors.msg: Invalid admin

errors.name: ProposalNotInDraftState
errors.msg: Proposal is not in draft state

errors.name: InsufficientTokenBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient token balance

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: Invalid amount

errors.name: InsufficientStakeToLaunch
errors.msg: Insufficient stake to launch proposal

errors.name: StakerNotFound
errors.msg: Staker not found in proposal

errors.name: PoolNotInSpotState
errors.msg: Pool must be in spot state

errors.name: InvalidDaoCreateLiquidity
errors.msg: If you're providing liquidity, you must provide both base and quote token accounts

errors.name: InvalidStakeAccount
errors.msg: Invalid stake account

errors.name: InvariantViolated
errors.msg: An invariant was violated. You should get in contact with the MetaDAO team if you see this

errors.name: ProposalNotActive
errors.msg: Proposal needs to be active to perform a conditional swap

errors.name: InvalidTransaction
errors.msg: This Squads transaction should only contain calls to update spending limits

errors.name: ProposalAlreadySponsored
errors.msg: Proposal has already been sponsored

errors.name: InvalidTeamSponsoredPassThreshold
errors.msg: Team sponsored pass threshold must be between -10% and 10%

errors.name: InvalidTargetK
errors.msg: Target K must be greater than the current K

errors.name: InvalidTransactionMessage
errors.msg: Failed to compile transaction message for Squads vault transaction

errors.name: InvalidMint
errors.msg: Base mint and quote mint must be different
